_comment: Biome -> PBR pack for the terrain-blend texture arrays. Keyed by mapgen::biome_name() (src/mapgen/biomes.hpp); the array layer index is the Biome enum value (Lake=0, Swamp=1, Forest=2, Plains=3, Hills=4). Every biome must be present. All packs must share one texture size (currently 1024x1024) — a texture array has one size for all layers. No grass/sand/water pack exists yet, so these are the closest available; swapping one in later is a change to this file only.
